title: Pivot boards no row grouping
excerpt: Hi, Just added my first pivot board to my dashboard and there are no options for row or column grouping? Any idea how to add them. Thanks

posts.author: AndyTaylor (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Just added my first pivot board to my dashboard and there are no options for row or column grouping? Any idea how to add them. Thanks

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @AndyTaylor, can you me show an example of this? I think I have come across a similar issue with displaying totals per Column Value incase that is what you mean (you can only have one on each axis).

posts.author: AndyTaylor (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bruce, It was resolved as I located at the bottom left where as videos has them top left.
